# Code Review

Review pull requests for code quality, best practices, and potential bugs. This skill covers review methodology, common patterns, and feedback best practices.

## Review Checklist

- Check for correctness and edge cases
- Verify error handling
- Review naming and readability
- Assess test coverage

## Feedback Guidelines

Provide constructive, actionable feedback with specific suggestions.
